title: Defense and Aerospace Product Explorer | Teradyne

sections.name: Header / Navigation
sections.description: Site header with Teradyne logo, top bar (eKnowledge, Language selector, Search), and main navigation (Products, Applications, Services, Support, Company). Gradient teal/dark background.

contentSequences.description: Top bar utility links: eKnowledge, Language dropdown, Search
Primary navigation menu: Products, Applications, Services, Support, Company

sections.name: Breadcrumb
sections.description: Breadcrumb trail: Home > Defense and Aerospace Product Explorer

sections.name: Product Explorer App
sections.description: Main content area containing the Product Finder React application (interactive product explorer/filter). The div#product-finder-root is empty in static HTML - it's a client-side rendered JavaScript application for browsing defense and aerospace products.

sections.name: Footer
sections.description: Site footer with Teradyne logo, footer navigation links (About Us, Careers, CSR, Blog, Investor Relations, Contact Us, Management, Newsroom), newsletter signup form (HubSpot), social media links (X/Twitter, LinkedIn, YouTube, Facebook), TugX logo, copyright, and secondary footer links (Sitemap, Cookie Policy, Privacy Policy).

contentSequences.description: Footer navigation links: About Us, Careers, CSR, Blog, Investor Relations, Contact Us, Management, Newsroom
Social media links: X/Twitter, LinkedIn, YouTube, Facebook
Secondary footer links: Sitemap, Cookie Policy, Privacy Policy

blockInventory.note: This page's main content is a React-rendered interactive product explorer app. The static HTML has an empty #product-finder-root div. The page primarily consists of header, an empty content area (JS app), and footer. No traditional EDS blocks are needed for the main content area since it's an interactive application.
